title: Ender Chest Manipulator
description: A simple datapack allowing you to manipulate ender chests. E.G: View, edit
body:
Ever play on a multiplayer server, and want to access other players ender chests? This datapack allows you to do just that, in a seamless and easy-to-follow way.

Features:
 - View other players ender chest

Plans: 
 - Editing other players ender chest
